description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modular booth structure with a predominantly white exterior and a geometric patterned rear wall. The front features an open entryway with a prominent orange awning labeled 'A – 01 Engi World' and a matching orange carpet or platform leading inside. The interior back wall displays a green and yellow printed sign with event and stall information. The side and rear walls are solid, providing privacy and separation from the surroundings, while the roof is flat and bordered by a metallic frame. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for temporary installations at expos or urban events.
description: A modern, white modular kiosk with a geometric rear wall, orange awning, and open front entry, designed for events or expos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entry, orange awning with signage, interior platform, and event poster on the back wall.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid white wall and partial view of the metallic roof frame, with no visible signage or entry.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the geometric patterned wall, flat roof, and absence of entry or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid white wall and partial metallic frame, mirroring the other side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign on orange awning above entrance with text 'A – 01 Engi World'; printed poster on interior back wall with event details.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open entryway at front, no physical door.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof bordered by metallic frame, no overhangs or skylights.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern modular with geometric decorative elements.
